2525o93834o413.content:
NewswireGTA OnlineContent Updates
The Kortz Center Heist Now Available in GTA Online
July 14, 2026

The Kortz Center, venue for the most dazzling soirees in Los Santos and repository of the world’s most provocatively expensive and expensively provocative artwork. And now, the target of your classiest Heist.  

Break into the art world by knocking over high society's cultural epicenter and making off with lucrative treasures from its latest exhibition in GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist.

The Bell Building inside the Kortz Center houses the Albert Crisp Collection: a curated selection of fine art ranging from antiquities of exotic provenance to works from contemporary masters. Mr. Faber’s clientele are interested in a rotating selection of Primary Targets stored inside the Center’s vault, too rare and prized to display to the public.

Accessing these vaulted treasures will require bypassing state-of-the-art defenses including first-rate security teams, watchful CCTV cameras, and intersecting laser tripwires. Scoping out these measures and preparing the ideal approach is left to your discretion. Whatever you decide, professional hustler Raf De Angelis will be in your ear to help as you prepare to execute an art theft par excellence. 

While the Primary Target is the main attraction, the vault and displays in the Bell Building also contain discretionary Secondary Targets that can be swiped to fatten up your final take. Stealing these will require you to infiltrate the Center’s security even further, and some will require additional hands along with ample bag space to depart with your haul intact. 

Ultimately, you can decide if you want to sell the Primary Target or keep it for yourself to display inside your Mansion.

Upgrade your Mansion with the Art Studio, a versatile new space that serves as your base of operations for this Heist. Once acquired, expert counterfeiter Yong-Rae will begin creating convincing replicas to replace your Primary Targets so that Kortz Center staff will be none the wiser.  

Set yourself up for further success by fully upgrading the grounds of your Mansion. An Armory will add a powerful Mk II weapon to each of your Heist loadouts, while the Vehicle Workshop will improve performance for certain getaway vehicles. Your personal Security staff will aid in distracting police during your escape, reducing your Wanted level. 

Plus, many existing properties and resources can provide helpful benefits while you're in the heat of the Finale. Owning a Bunker adds Special Ammo and Upgrades to the Mk II weapon included with the Mansion Armory, while owning an Agency, the Darnell Bros. Garment Factory, or a Terrorbyte grants additional time to steal the Primary Target Painting in the Vault. Having an Arcade Drone Station will make its Nano Drones available to assist during the Finale. 

You’ll need the Art Studio to host and launch The Kortz Center Heist, but you can join up as a member of a Heist crew without owning a Mansion (GTA+ Members can also still get a GTA$2,000,000 discount on any Mansion property). Assembling a team is entirely optional, although teaming up will allow you to access a Secondary Target room beyond the reach of solo thieves, while more duffels will increase your maximum take. 

Gear will accumulate in the Art Studio as you complete prep and planning, and team members can select their own loadouts for the Finale. 

The Kortz Center’s security isn’t just going to let you waltz out of there with masterpieces under your arm, and art known to be stolen won’t command as high of a price on the secondary market. Prepping, planning, and stealth will be crucial to maximizing your yield.  

Not adhering to these core tenets will leave you with fewer entrance and exit options, while rolling solo will prevent you from stealing more valuable Secondary Targets. 

Stealing some of these fragile masterpieces also won’t be an option without securing the appropriate tools to safely extract them. 

Spending more time scoping out the Kortz Center will result in better intel and reveal different entrances and additional prep missions to bolster your chances of success. These will affect your approach and escape strategies, while optional disruptions will weaken the Kortz Center’s security or leave them confused about your whereabouts.  

On top of the extraordinary new variability and action-packed excitement of The Kortz Center Heist, the treasures contained inside the museum's hallowed halls make it one of the most lucrative undertakings throughout Southern San Andreas. 

As part of our ongoing experience improvements in GTA Online, we’re adding a weekly bonus for the first Primary Target sold after completing The Kortz Center Heist each week. Subsequent playthroughs will saturate the market and lead to buyer fatigue along with decreased payouts, although this presents a rare chance to have it both ways. Secure the bag on your first attempt then show you are truly part of the city's culturally sophisticated set by procuring these masterworks for display inside your Mansion.  

This same principle also now applies to other Heists and updates like The Contract, The Cluckin’ Bell Farm Raid, and Oscar Guzman Flies Again — so make sure to shake up your routine and mix things up by experiencing the full assortment of activities GTA Online has to offer. 

The Kortz Center Heist arrives alongside a fleet of new vehicles for you to add to your collection, including: 

The Benefactor LRC GT (Super) was engineered with complete and utter domination in mind. Find your local podium and double-park on top of it.  

The Grotti Cartuccia GT (Sports) glistens in the Vespucci Beach sun like a wealthy Italian tourist.   

Many red-blooded Americans grow up with pictures of Albany’s retro models stuck to their walls. You deserve the real deal, a vision of the future that just rolled off the assembly line. Enter the Albany Merula (Sedan). 

Hum at a higher frequency than the crude, oil-powered vehicles surrounding you in traffic with the conscientious Ocelot E-Stride (SUV). 

Whether you’re transporting your crew to a job site or from the scene of the crime, the Benefactor Läufer (Van) was built to switch lanes smoothly and discreetly.

GTA+ Members also receive one week of early access to the new Grotti Veleno GT (Super). Missile Lock-On Jammer capability has also been added to 50 more current vehicles, enhancing their defensive countermeasures. 

Completing all of The Kortz Center Heist's Tier 4 Career Progress challenges on PS5, XBOX Series X|S, or PC (Enhanced) will grant you the new Vapid Caracara (Armored), an aggressive off-road vehicle equipped with a wedge to toss aside bothersome traffic with ease.

Mansion owners who reached Elitist status in the Fine Art Collector program between June 18 and July 13 can claim their rewards between now and August 5. These include a GTA$1,000,000 discount on the Art Studio expansion (GTA$2,000,000 for GTA+ Members), a free Vault Keypad upgrade available from the Planning Board to practice cracking the Kortz Center’s security systems, and a free Annihilator Stealth helicopter from Warstock. 

Elitists will also get The Crescent Tense, a Kortz Center Sculpture to decorate their Mansion. Additionally, this Tier gets the opportunity to steal The Outcome of Endeavour, a high-value Primary Target Painting, on their first attempt at the Heist during each of the next three weeks.

In addition to the ongoing GTA$2,000,000 discount on Mansion properties for GTA+ Members, there's also still time to claim 40% bonus GTA$ on Megalodon, Whale, or Great White Shark Cards (must claim the offer by July 22, 2026, and purchase qualifying Shark Cards by August 5, 2026).

This week, GTA+ Members receive one week of early access to the new Grotti Veleno GT (Super), free to claim at The Vinewood Car Club and outfitted in its special Attack livery.  

GTA+ Members also get tons of additional benefits in GTA Online, including a GTA$2,000,000 discount on Mansion properties, a GTA$1,000,000 discount on the Art Studio expansion, an extra 15% GTA$ on all Shark Card purchases, and much more.

For details on all the benefits of becoming a GTA+ Member, visit the official site.

Today’s update also includes the latest Mission Creator updates, with plenty of new props, actor models, and more — including interiors available to explore and utilize on PS5, XBOX Series X|S, and PC (Enhanced). Craft survival scenarios with bloodthirsty zombies, build immersive structures or parkour courses with sliding and rotating props, add warp points to teleport players to different areas, and so much more.

There are also new stealth systems, including disguises and CCTV cameras for players to deal with. Bring your true artistic vision to life with comprehensive cutscene enhancements that allow for more creative scene-setting and narrative-building. 

We’ll continue to add quality creations to the Community Mission Series regularly and hope to see creators take advantage of upcoming future additions, including zombies and all manner of ghosts and ghouls planned for later this month — in time to be featured as part of a special seasonal Mission Series in the fall. 

To stay informed on all the improvements and updates coming to the Creator, and to share your creations and feedback with us and other creators, join the community on the official Discord server. Also, be sure to tag your creations with #CommunitySeries for consideration in a future Series.


Play GTA Online for Free on PS5 or XBOX Series X|S This Week 

This week, everyone can enjoy the latest updates to GTA Online on the current generation of consoles for free with no PS Plus or Game Pass Essential required. Download and play GTA Online on PlayStation 5 or XBOX Series X|S for free through July 20. 


More to Come 

Prepare for more action in the weeks and months ahead, including a new supercar model joining the roster of decommissioned Law Enforcement Vehicles, along with new drift-capable vehicles, updates to the Community Mission Series, and more.

k4ao4417o525k5.content:
NewswireGTA OnlineContent Updates
The Kortz Center Heist, Coming to GTA Online July 14
July 9, 2026

Scope out Los Santos’ premier cultural space and pocket prized artworks in The Kortz Center Heist, coming to GTA Online on July 14. 

Link up with the mysterious Mr. Faber and his chief fixer Raf De Angelis to take on a blockbuster new Heist — where you'll meticulously stake out the museum and carefully plot your approach, then snatch the Kortz Center’s most valuable exhibits.

Fake It Until You Take It

Taking down a culturally and commercially high-value target like the Kortz Center requires a proportionate level of preparation. Investing in an Art Studio space expansion inside your Mansion will get you started. Similar to other owned properties, Mansion owners can also extend an invite to their friends and host them inside their Art Studio. 

Once renovated, a gifted counterfeiter will occupy the Studio crafting forgeries to replace the valuable target pieces inside the museum. Consider them your personal artist-in-residence. Gear and tech will accumulate inside your Art Studio as you prepare, and you and your associates will be able to select from this stockpile when building a custom loadout for the Finale.  

Approach solo, or with a crew of up to three other players — having extra hands may help you escape with more. Raf will be your point man for the Heist, sharing reconnaissance and vital intel as you execute your well-prepared plans. You can also expect your Mansion’s trusty AI Assistant to come in handy. 

For those making their initial foray into Mansion ownership there’s still time to take advantage of a special limited-time bonus GTA$ offer, and Prix Luxury Real Estate’s Richman Villa property in the Vinewood Hills is just a short drive to the Kortz Center. 

The Art of the Steal

Scope out the Kortz Center in Pacific Bluffs to stroll among the works in the gallery’s latest collection, snap candid photos of the paintings on the walls without alerting security, and ascertain how to get in and out of the cultural foundation unscathed — with substantial variability to help keep your options open. 

Once you’ve scoped out the exhibit, you can meticulously plan out and gear up for your final approach. As the most prestigious exhibition gallery in all of Los Santos, the Kortz Center also contains an abundance of fine art that can be stolen as Secondary Targets, and these stack up quickly — making this newest Heist a most fiscally enriching score. Scoping can be beneficial to identifying these treasures as well as discovering multiple viable escape routes. 

Covering your tracks and being covert will be crucial for a maximum take, since art known to be stolen will be harder to fence, commanding lower prices on the secondary market. Ensuring no witnesses and wiping CCTV footage will keep the heat off you and your take higher.

Establish Your Own Collection

Display your trophies with pride of place. In addition to serving as a base of clandestine planning operations, the Art Studio also allows you to show off successfully stolen masterworks inside your Mansion instead of selling to Mr. Faber’s clientele.  

Every week that initial sale will garner the most robust payout, but with the option to keep stolen Primary Target paintings and decorate your Mansion, along with three new paintings to steal each week and tons of variability in how you approach them, The Kortz Center Heist offers a unique new level of replayability.

And More…

Fully prepare for The Kortz Center Heist by making sure you’re enrolled in the Fine Art Collector program. Play GTA Online to get a GTA$500,000 bonus and a free Benefactor Turreted Limo (Sedan), then complete any Heist to claim the NOOSE Outfit and a GTA$1,000,000 bonus through July 13. 

Mansion owners who play GTA Online through July 13 will achieve Elitist status in the program and receive a free Annihilator Stealth helicopter, a GTA$1,000,000 discount on the Art Studio expansion, a Kortz Center Sculpture, and the opportunity to steal a special, high-value Painting to sell or keep inside their Mansion. 

The Kortz Center Heist will also introduce new vehicles to GTA Online this summer, including Supercars, as well as Drift and Hao’s Special Works upgrade-compatible options. GTA+ Members will be able to claim the brand new Grotti Veleno GT for free from The Vinewood Car Club showroom starting July 14, a week before it goes on sale to the public. Also, look for updates to the Rockstar Mission Creator, and much more.

Enjoy Star-Spangled GTA Online Bonuses This Independence Day
Claim a Free Bunker During the Biggest Sale Ever, Join the Fine Art Collector Program, and Much More
July 2, 2026

Commemorate a milestone Independence Day in GTA Online with our biggest sale ever, featuring a free Lago Zancudo Bunker property along with bonuses on Bunker and Gunrunning Missions, Triple Rewards on Stunt Races, the return of the Vapid Liberator monster truck and the classic Western Sovereign motorcycle, and much more. 

Fortify yourself from threats by claiming the Lago Zancudo Bunker for free from Maze Bank Foreclosures through July 13. If you’d prefer a different location, all other Bunker properties and all Bunker Upgrades and Modifications are 40% off through July 13. 

Our Biggest Independence Day Sale Ever

Exercise your inalienable rights and individual freedoms by engaging in time-honored consumer capitalism. We’re celebrating with our biggest sale ever: a cross-category blowout of discounts spanning aircraft, special and weaponized vehicles, and superlative rides new and old.

Use vertical takeoff/landing capabilities and onboard comms to take your criminal enterprise to new heights and save over GTA$2,400,000 on the Mammoth Avenger from Warstock. Outfit it with the Operations Terminal to assist the Los Santos Angels with Project Overthrow and LSA Operations.  

Invest in state-of-the-art military and surveillance tech and save over GTA$800,000 on the Mobile Operations Center, available for 60% off this week. Hop over meaningless obstacles like the “highway median” and use a jet-fueled rocket boost to propel yourself to your destination behind the wheel of the Declasse Scramjet (Super), on sale from Warstock at 60% off through July 13.

“Life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness” should include filling out your fleet with formidable rides like the Übermacht Sentinel GTS (Sports) and Pegassi Tezeract (Super), on sale for 50% and 60% off this week, respectively.

Star-Spangled Discounts

Fill the sky with color using a free Firework Launcher available from Ammu-Nation locations and the Gun Van. Spread out your vehicle collection in a free High-End Garage through July 13. Plus, take 40% off an assortment of patriotic gear, liveries, accessories, and apparel: 

Patriotic Tire Smoke | Star Spangled Banner Horns | ‘Stars n Stripes’ Face Paint | Mullet Hairstyle | Patriot Chute Parachute | Patriot Smoke Trail Parachute Smoke | Independence Day Liveries for Mk II Weapons | Independence Day Liveries for the Mobile Operations Center | Independence Day Special Clothing, Masks, and Outfits

Get 40% Bonus GTA$ on Qualifying Shark Cards

Plan the next big Heist with bonus GTA$. Link your GTA Online character to your Rockstar Games account and claim this offer by July 22, 2026. 

Claim Now

Terms apply* See below for details

Earn 40% Bonus GTA$ on Shark Cards

Prepare for The Kortz Center Heist by making the most of a limited-time offer for bonus GTA$. 

Players who connect their Rockstar Games account can opt in through July 22 to claim an additional 40% bonus GTA$ with the purchase of up to five Great White Shark, Whale, or Megalodon Shark Cards through August 5.

GTA+ Members can boost their bonus even further with the additional 15% bonus on Member Shark Cards applying to the total bonus GTA$ received. 

Independence Day Bunker Bonuses

Nothing says “rugged individualism” quite like an isolated underground fortress built to withstand the end of days. Fill yours with weapons and supplies using Disruption Logistics and make the most of Double Rewards on Bunker Sell Missions all week long. 

Turbocharge progress on all your projects with doubled Research Speeds and call Agent 14 to launch Bunker Research Missions, paying out 2X GTA$, RP, and Research Progress. Smash the Weekly Challenge by completing three Bunker Research Missions to get the Blue Jock Cranley Jumpsuit and GTA$100,000. 

Excess weapons parts can also be rerouted to local gun stores for 2X GTA$ and RP as part of the Ammu-Nation Contract. 

3X GTA$ and RP on Stunt Race Series

Defy death and gravity in the Stunt Race Series as you speed toward Triple Rewards through July 13. 

Navigate a pint-sized Panto into the endzone in a love letter to both gridlock and the gridiron: Running Back (Remix) returns to the Featured Series and is paying out 2X GTA$ and RP. 

Collect Beer Hats and More in Business Battles

The Beer Hat is a stunning invention smashing together two important summertime necessities, hydration and sunshade. Deliver crates in Business Battles to get your hands on the Pißwasser, Benedict, Patriot, and Supa Wet Beer Hats, as well as the patriotic Statue of Happiness T-Shirt. 

Double Rewards on the Community Series

Get down and dirty in a special mixed-genre Community Series celebrating Independence Day with thrilling Rally Races, Western-themed quickdraw duels, a Musket Deathmatch, and more, all paying out 2X GTA$ and RP through July 13.

Last Chance to Join the Fine Art Collector Program

Next week marks the conclusion of the Fine Art Collector program. Playing GTA Online before July 13 will verify Enthusiast status and immediately qualify you for a free Benefactor Turreted Limo (Sedan) from Warstock, along with a one-time GTA$500,000 bonus delivered within 72 hours of logging in.  

Completing any Heist in GTA Online elevates you to the Patron Tier, which awards another GTA$1,000,000 bonus in addition to the NOOSE Outfit delivered within 72 hours of completion. 

Mansion owners can qualify for the most prestigious and beneficial level just by playing GTA Online between now and July 13. NewswireGTA OnlineContent Updates
The Next Big Score
June 17, 2026

Perched on the hills of Pacific Bluffs, the world-famous Kortz Center looms large over the Los Santos cultural scene. Priceless international works of art have adorned its hallways for years, and now the time has come to raid this prestigious gallery’s esteemed collection for personal gain in The Kortz Center Heist, this summer's exciting new update coming to GTA Online in July.

To accommodate burgeoning interests in art theft and counterfeiting, you’ll need to add the Art Studio to your Mansion property, then scope out the sprawling Kortz Center complex before choosing an approach for this multi-stage Heist infiltrating and escaping the grounds.

Gear Up

In the coming weeks, GTA Online will be brimming with ways to prepare for The Kortz Center Heist. Whether you’re looking to refine your real estate portfolio with a Mansion property to ultimately host your own solo Heists or gearing up as part of a larger crew, stay tuned for special events featuring bonus GTA$ rewards, record-breaking discounts, and opportunities to claim rare and exclusive treasures through the Fine Art Collector program. 

Plus, if you’re still in the market for one of Prix Luxury Real Estate’s lavish properties, look out for an upcoming GTA$2,000,000 discount for GTA+ Members. Also, everyone can take advantage of a new limited-time offer where you’ll be able to get 40% bonus GTA$ on qualifying Shark Cards.

Free Upgrades and More… 

Beginning tomorrow, those who own any PS4 version or the digital Xbox One version of Grand Theft Auto V will be able to upgrade to the PS5 or Xbox Series X|S versions at no additional cost, and experience the best versions of GTAV and GTA Online ahead of the launch of The Kortz Center Heist. GTAV and GTA Online on PS5 and Xbox Series X|S feature vast technical improvements, easy migration of your Story Mode and Online progress, and new features including Hao’s Special Works high-performance vehicles and upgrades, Career Progress rewards, and much more.  

PC players can also experience all these updates along with PC-only features, such as ray traced ambient occlusion and global illumination, by upgrading from Legacy to Enhanced for free. And if you still haven’t experienced GTAV’s Story Mode yet, GTA+ Members can also now access it — along with GTA Online — as part of the GTA+ Games Library.

Stay tuned to the Rockstar Newswire for more about GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist, coming to PS5, PS4, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, and PC in July.

For more info on how to upgrade GTAV and GTA Online, please visit Rockstar Support.

A BUSTLING FRONTIER BENEFITS ALL ROLES IN RED DEAD ONLINE
Double Rewards on All Bounties, Collector Set Sales, Daily Challenges, and More
June 2, 2026

The rising tide lifts all boats this month in Red Dead Online. Whatever your specialty, all Roles benefit from boosted bonuses. Bounty Hunters tracking targets, Traders wheeling and dealing in furs and pelts, and Collectors combing the frontier for treasure all stand to gain. 

All the while, Naturalists can assist by sighting and sampling rare wildlife, and Moonshiners can get rich moving illicit swill right underneath the law’s nose. 

Earn bonuses and rewards across all Roles while taking advantage of waived Fast Travel fees, assembling a free Community-Inspired Outfit, and more through June 29.

2X RDO$ AND XP ON ALL BOUNTIES

Licensed Bounty Hunters can dispense frontier justice and earn Double RDO$ and XP hauling in Regular, Infamous, and Legendary Bounties, dead or alive.

Complete any Legendary Bounty through June 29 to get the Clovelly Shirt. 

2X RDO$ AND XP ON COLLECTOR SETS

Unearth hidden valuables and sell Collector Sets to Madam Nazar to receive 2X RDO$ and XP in exchange. 

Find and collect a Fossil anytime this month to receive the Clovelly Dropped Suspenders. 

DOUBLE REWARDS ON SPECIALIST SALES

Brew up a potent batch, sell prized pelts, or offload rare wildlife samples to earn 2X RDO$ and XP completing Moonshine Sales, Trader Sales, and Naturalist Sample Sales. 

Find and sample any Legendary Animal this month to receive the Clovelly Pants. Destroy a Revenue Agent Blockade to receive the Clovelly Hat. 

For more information on how to get started in any of Red Dead Online's Specialist Roles, visit the dedicated page on the official site. 

2X GOLD ON DAILY CHALLENGES

Rise to various occasions and earn 2X Gold by completing all your Daily Challenges through June 29. In addition to the monetary reward, complete all Daily Challenges in one day to receive the Goldwing Spurs. Complete all your Trader Daily Challenges to receive the Clovelly Boots.

Specialists who max out their Role Rank and play Red Dead Online this month will receive the following Treasure Map Rewards: 

June 2–8: Rank 20 Moonshiners will receive a Reward for the North Ridgewood Treasure Map 

June 9–15: Rank 20 Bounty Hunters will receive a Reward for the Civil War Battlefield Treasure Map 

June 16–22: Rank 20 Collectors will receive a Reward for the O’Creagh’s Run Treasure Map 

June 23–29: Rank 20 Traders will receive a Reward for the Bluewater Marsh Treasure Map  

RETURNING LIMITED-TIME CLOTHING

In addition to the pieces making up the Clovelly Outfit, the following items have returned to the Wheeler, Rawson & Co. Catalogue: Irwin Coat, Plaid Cap, Gator Hat, Chambliss Corset, and Hitched Skirt. 

COMMUNITY-INSPIRED OUTFIT

Dress yourself in Yankee finery with a Community-Inspired Outfit created by Kindainappropriate_ from the r/reddeadfashion community. Assemble this military look free of charge by claiming the following from the Catalogue: 

Regimental Hat

Fernwater Coat 

Union Suit (Male) or Work Shirtwaist (Female) 

Worn Rolled Pants

Lumber Boots

Neckerchief 

FAST TRAVEL FEES

BOUNTY HUNTER LICENSE

BUTCHER’S TABLE

COLLECTOR’S BAG

MOONSHINE SHACK

SAMPLE KIT

ALL ROLE HORSES AND OUTFITS

THE CLELLAND AND HARAWAY OUTFITS

EMOTES

PISTOLS AND PISTOL STYLE CUSTOMIZATIONS

BOOTS, GLOVES, AND SHIRTS

Rev your engine and get ready for two weeks of automotive mayhem as Los Santos is engulfed in the high-octane, nitrous-infused action of Motor Madness.

Trade paint as you jostle for position with Quadruple Rewards on Land Races from May 14 through May 20, obtain rare prizes for acquiring big-ticket rides at showrooms and podiums around town, get a free LS Car Meet Membership, and rake it in with added bonuses for Salvage Yard and Auto Shop owners.

Flow upstream between motorists in oncoming traffic with the new Water Like livery for your Vapid FMJ MK V (Super), available from all Vehicle Workshops in GTA Online.

Play GTA Online anytime through May 27 to receive the Rockstar Helmet and protect the money maker.

Purchase any vehicle displayed in Simeon’s Premium Deluxe Motorsport showroom to receive the Rockstar Racing Suit. Buy any vehicle from the Luxury Autos showroom display to receive the LS Customs Varsity Jacket.

Not all rides are destined for the podium — some are bound for the landfill to be scrapped and sold for parts.

You can also floor it and earn 3X GTA$ and RP on the HSW Time Trial and 4X GTA$ and RP on Land Races during the first week of Motor Madness. 

Dominate the Racing Scene

Take part in the LS Car Meet Series to reap 2X GTA$ and RP prizes across Street, Pursuit, Drag, and Drift Races — plus there’s 5X Reputation for all LS Car Meet related activities. If you're not already an LS Car Meet Member, visit Mimi inside the LS Car Meet and get a free membership. 

If you prefer to test your skills against the clock, Junk Energy Time Trials and RC Time Trials will both pay out Double Rewards May 21–27.

Once you’ve got your Auto Shop up and running (40% off May 21–27, including Upgrades and Modifications), lend a hand with clandestine Auto Shop Robbery Contracts to earn 2X GTA$ and RP on their Finales May 21–27.

2X GTA$ and RP on the Community Race Series

Compete on the most creative tracks built by players in the Community Race Series and take part in the kinds of thrills and spills that deserve 2X GTA$ and RP through May 27. 

Discounts

Defy every red light in the iconic Bravado Banshee GTS, a sportscar of impressive pedigree that’s on sale for 40% off for the next two weeks of Motor Madness. Give your car collection room to breathe — the Eclipse Blvd Garage is 40% off from May 14–20 and all other Garage Properties are 40% off from May 21–27.  

Upgrade your eligible rides from stock to supercharged: HSW Performance Upgrades, Turbo Tuning, and Conversions at Benny’s Original Motor Works are 50% off through May 27.

Get Doubled Warehouse Stock and Nightclub Goods, Plus Discounts on Nightclub Properties, and More
May 7, 2026

Running the hottest club in town can be both a formidable and prosperous enterprise. This week, nightlife impresarios are poised to be handsomely compensated by keeping the dance floor packed, the troublemakers out of sight, and their connected illicit businesses humming. 

Get 2X GTA$ in Daily Income from owned Nightclubs, and if you’re not part of the after-hours scene yet (or just looking to make a few improvements), visit Maze Bank Foreclosures to take advantage of 40% off any Nightclub property and all Upgrades and Modifications. 

Keep Your Nightclub Warehouse Stocked

The staff manning your Nightclub Warehouse are all keyed-up and moving a mile-a-minute, doubling Nightclub Warehouse Stock Production Speed. You can also stock up on 2X GTA$, RP, and Nightclub Goods by winning Business Battles or assisting Yohan in Nightclub Goods Missions.

Keep your establishment on the lips of every socialite and Bleeter influencer by completing Nightclub Management Missions to earn Double Rewards through May 13.

2X GTA$ and RP on Terrorbyte Client Jobs

2X GTA$ and RP on Deadline

Cut off your opponents and use your Nagasaki Shotaro’s lethal light trail to blow them to bits in Deadline, including Deadline Duet, paying out 2X GTA$ and RP as part of the Featured Series through May 13.  




Triple Rewards on the Community Mission Series 

This week is your last chance to play the very first Mission featured in our Community Mission Series: Old School Hits by GTA Series Videos, a remix of three classic wet work assignments from the original Grand Theft Auto trilogy that’s paying out 3X GTA$ and RP. Look out for more updates soon.

Upcoming Improvements and Adjustments

We are constantly working to make GTA Online a better experience for all players; this includes rebalancing, targeting cheaters and other players negatively impacting the game, and striving to make all experiences as accessible as possible, so everyone can have fun and earn GTA$ no matter how they choose to play. Starting next week, we will be doubling base payouts for Special Vehicle Work, Mobile Operations Missions, and Casino Work and Story Missions. All Bail Office Targets, A Superyacht Life, and Project Overthrow Missions will also receive a 50% boost. 

In addition to these payout boosts, we will be adjusting vehicle pricing so that certain vehicles are more accessible and have prices that better reflect their value.
